description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text reads, in part, 'If you import The Third World, you become The Third World!' followed by a statement that this will not happen to the United States while the author is president, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; If you import The Third World, you become The Third World!
